purpose: Register already-found planning and transportation sources for CFS feature readiness review.

policy.rest_source_relocation_warning: Cabarrus and partner REST services may move during ongoing layer organization. If a URL fails, inspect service roots, layer IDs, and fallback notes before marking unavailable.

sources.source_name: City of Concord Land Use Plan 2030
caveats: Does not replace countywide small-area plan or countywide future land use GIS.
Do not treat as countywide land-use context.
sources.fallback_notes: If this layer moves, inspect the Concord Planning_Webmap_Public_MIL1 service root before marking unavailable.

caveats: Does not include every local concept road, small intersection improvement, or plan-only local project.
Should be spatially filtered to Cabarrus County during future ingestion.
Not time-safe for historical model training unless project availability/adoption dates are aligned to snapshot years.
sources.fallback_notes: If this layer moves, inspect NCDOT STIP service roots and published item metadata before marking unavailable.

caveats: Current station context unless historical AADT by year is available later.
Station proximity is a traffic-intensity proxy, not parcel-specific driveway traffic.
sources.fallback_notes: If this layer moves, inspect NCDOT ArcGIS Online AADT station services before marking unavailable.

caveats: Does not replace countywide official rezoning approval history.
Case records should not be interpreted as final approvals without status/date field review.
sources.fallback_notes: If this layer moves, inspect the Concord Planning_Webmap_Public_MIL1 service root before marking unavailable.
